---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or crashing
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What should have happened instead?

## Screenshots
If the app goes blank or shows an error message, a screenshot helps a lot.

## Environment
- OS: Windows 10 / 11
- App version: (check the installer filename, e.g. `Budget Setup 1.0.0.exe`)

## Extra context
Anything else that might be relevant — e.g. did it happen after importing a CSV? After switching themes?
